messages.content:
Describe how the SEH might be manipulated in this context.

A denial service vulnerability has been found on  Hex Workshop affecting version 6.7, an attacker could send a command line file arguments and control the Structured Exception Handler (SEH) records resulting in a service shutdown.
An attacker can send malicious command line arguments that interfere with Structured Exception Handler (SEH) records, causing the application to mishandle exceptions and crash.
